description_long: This is a modern city bicycle with a matte teal frame and a classic diamond geometry, designed for urban commuting. It features two large, thin wheels with black tires and silver spokes, optimized for smooth pavement riding. The handlebars are flat and straight, providing an upright riding posture, and are equipped with light gray grips. The seat is a standard black saddle, ergonomically shaped for comfort during medium-length rides. The pedals are metallic and flat, suitable for casual shoes, and the drivetrain is single-speed, lacking visible gears or derailleurs. There are no baskets, racks, or additional accessories, giving the bicycle a minimalist and streamlined appearance.
description: A teal, minimalist city bicycle with a diamond frame, flat handlebars, and a standard black saddle. It has two large wheels and a clean, accessory-free design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat handlebars, narrow profile, and centered seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the diamond frame, large wheels, and single-speed drivetrain.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the seat, rear wheel, and both pedals.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the frame, wheels, and pedal details.
